thesis_profile.market_mechanism: in the liquid perp-covered core, four distinct alpha mechanisms dominate in a two-dimensional regime grid formed by per-timestamp cross-sectional momentum dispersion and cross-sectional median momentum: high-dispersion up regimes favor leader-continuation, high-dispersion down regimes favor carry-dislocation, low-dispersion broad-up regimes favor defensive-quality grinder names rather than chase, and low-dispersion broad-down regimes favor a contrarian laggard tilt that fades over-extended chase
thesis_profile.directional_claim: rank liquid perp-covered names higher by blending four sub-signals (leader-continuation, carry-dislocation, defensive-quality, contrarian laggard-tilt) where blend weights follow per-timestamp two-dimensional regime classification: dispersion separates dispersed vs broad-uniform regimes, sign of median momentum separates up vs down, contrarian is activated only in broad-down regimes, and defensive-quality is activated only in broad-up regimes
thesis_profile.factor_formula: compute four name-level sub-scores (leader-continuation, carry-dislocation, defensive-quality, contrarian laggard-tilt) and blend them using a per-timestamp two-dimensional regime classification: high-dispersion timestamps allocate between leader and carry by sign of median momentum, low-dispersion timestamps allocate between defensive-quality (positive median) and contrarian laggard-tilt (negative median); apply common quality screens for distress, blow-up volatility, and broken-tape setups
